appraisal_events.evidence: « Mais, pas tant que ça ; vous vous trompez complètement… Je suis soldat et avant tout pour l’armée. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Robert bluntly rejects Swann’s assumption of political alignment, distancing himself and checking Swann’s attempted inclusion.

status_effects.explanation: By contradicting Swann decisively, Robert asserts independence and gains local argumentative authority.
He loses leverage when Robert corrects him and refuses political alignment.
